title: Deprecate DataTools Passcodes from PBO Salesforce
description: Remove the DataTools Passcodes object/fields from the PBO (Payment Business Object) in Salesforce. These passcodes are no longer used in production and should be cleaned up from the data model to maintain good data hygiene and reduce confusion.
acceptance_criteria: DataTools Passcodes object/fields are removed from PBO Salesforce
No existing production functionality is broken by the removal
The Salesforce data model no longer references deprecated passcode fields
data_model_changes: Remove DataTools Passcodes object/fields from the PBO Salesforce data model.
implementation_notes: Data model cleanup task. Verify no existing integrations or code reference the passcodes fields before removal.
